data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — Added 3 UPDATE tests: test_orphan_marker_removed_and_slow_path_taken (FAIL/RED), test_valid_marker_not_removed (PASS — valid-marker no-change case), test_orphan_marker_cache_miss_on_self_heal (FAIL/RED). 2 of 3 fail on current code as expected; test_valid_marker_not_removed passes (validates existing fast-skip behavior is preserved).
